title: Napster Station
pageTitle: Napster Station | AI Browser for the Physical World

sections.label: Real-World Impact
sections.headline: Just say what you need.
sections.body: Watch how natural conversation replaces complex interfaces across every industry.

sections.label: MEASURABLE IMPACT
sections.headline: Up to 40% shorter queue times.
sections.body: Voice-enabled interactions transform minutes into seconds, saving time for customers and reducing operational costs.
sections.footnote: Performance metrics are based on internal testing and simulated deployment scenarios. Actual results may vary depending on implementation, environment, and use case.

sections.label: Napster Station
sections.headline: Watch the film.
sections.body: See Napster Station in action. The future of AI-powered kiosks.

sections.label: Built Different
sections.headline: Engineered for impossible spaces.
sections.body: Where ordinary voice assistants fail, Napster Station thrives.

features.title: Premium Design
features.desc: Craftsmanship that belongs in your space. Walnut. Aluminum. Zero plastic.

features.title: Multimodal Sensing
features.desc: Vision and audio create context-aware responses.

features.title: VoiceField™ Array
features.desc: Isolates your voice in chaotic, high-decibel environments.

features.title: Audiophile-grade Sound
features.desc: Studio-grade 7-driver system with dedicated bass, delivering 280W of room-filling sound.

sections.label: Deploy Anywhere
sections.headline: Designed for every space.
sections.body: Premium walnut and aluminum construction elevates any environment.

sections.label: FIRST CONTACT
sections.headline: The greeting.
sections.body: Napster Station creates the most humanlike interaction in any environment.

steps.title: Detects Presence
steps.desc: Station Sight recognizes someone approaching from up to 3 meters away.

steps.title: Reads Intent
steps.desc: Distinguishes between someone walking by and someone stepping up to engage.

steps.title: Initiates Contact
steps.desc: Delivers a warm, natural greeting that feels genuinely welcoming.

sections.label: Vision Capability
sections.headline: Station VoiceField™.
sections.body: VoiceField™ creates the most human-like interaction capabilities in self-service technology.

steps.title: Natural Conversations
steps.desc: Voice interactions feel natural and intuitive, adapting tone and pace based on visual cues about the user's state.

steps.title: Contextual Awareness
steps.desc: The system understands not just what you say, but how you look while saying it — reading hesitation, confusion, or confidence.

steps.title: Seamless Adaptation
steps.desc: Real-time adjustments to interface, language, and interaction style create truly personalized experiences for every visitor.

cta.headline: Ready to transform your customer experience?
cta.body: Deploy the world's first AI-native concierge kiosk. Schedule a demonstration today.
